title: Eggstracting
description: Adds an enchantment to get spawn egss
body:
# Eggstracting

- This mod adds a new enchantment at 3 tiers to get spawn eggs from mobs.
- I: 0.5% chance.
- II: 1% chance.
- III: 1.5% chance.
## Issues
- Report on the github repo.

## Compatibility

- Compatible with JEI.
- Check out my Iron Spawners mod.
